Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC300 "FINALBLOW-CC20-C300" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $cc20 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Final Blow.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $CC20 which: 1. Copies 256 bytes of data from $CC50 down to $0000 2. Copies 512 bytes of data from $CD50 down to $0200
This allows the dump to start at $0400.
Note: as the original game is frozen, the breakpoint to use for dumping is actually $C314.
